semantic_boundary: Classify whether a proposed tool route remains inside the declared authority ceiling.
interface_contract: Read an authority transition record and return allow, deny, or review-required without executing the tool.
qualification_predicates: review route is separate from candidate output
evaluator_policy: Separate governance review checks the fixture before any route permission changes.
evaluator_independence: Separate review owns the route decision and the candidate cannot approve itself.
route_scope: shadow field only until authority review accepts the route
consumer_policy: Consumers may compare shadow decisions but must not execute the candidate as the default route.
state_migration: Shadow decisions create no production state.
regression_suite: non-escalation decisions remain deny or review-required
rollback_plan: Rollback is a no-op for production state; retain the existing approval path as fallback.
non_claims: does not prove runtime permission enforcement
